title: need advice NGE Manga confusion
wikitext:
[]: [need advice] NGE Manga confusion             Quote Post by OndrejTrhon » Sun Mar 20, 2011 6:22 am I'm sorry if this is somewhere, but i tried google, wikipedia, forums over there and not succeeded, so in that case, again, sorry. I have seen some NGE manga series on one of czech internet shops and according to the website volumes 1 and 10 looks like this: So here are my questions: 1) How is this edition (by information on eshop volume 1 released in 2004 and ten in 2007) related to original manga series? Is it different or only some sort of reprint? Is is col 2) Are these two related - like, in a line? It looks like they are but I want to be sure before I buy anything - there is different company logo at the top and slightly different design. Thank anyone for explaining this to me. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Mar 20, 2011 6:31 am Up to about 2004 and the first 7 volumes, the English language edition was printed in flipped format. Then a second, unflipped edition was produced, reprinting from the beginning. The latest volume (vol 12) came out in the last couple of months. The manga is still incomplete.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sun Mar 20, 2011 2:14 pm I've the official right-to-left correct unbutchered orientation version. It's really good, but fails to reach the magnificence of the anime. Also, the cover of the first volume is different in my version.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Mar 20, 2011 2:20 pm OndrejTrhon wrote:
